sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei tumtak in lungdamna lasa-in ka pai hi,
Khat veivei ka lungzuangin ka phun kha zelzel hi,
Hi bang dinmun ciang bek tawh vakthap lel ding maw,
Vantung mite tawh vanlapi sa khawm lo ding maw.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Mualsang tungpan in la aw gal zak ing,
A mah muang in mang leng kei zong sa thei ding hing,
Tua lungdamna thugen in ka vak kawm in ah,
Lim tak in ka ngaih tak ciangin Vanlapi ka za.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungdamna thu gimpi a, genbaih kei mah in teh,
Na ki pat khiat ding zong baih kei thei kha mah in teh,
Hi hang ki pan phot lecin na tel na ding hi,
Vanlapi a kisakna mun Zion na hi.
Tawntung ni taang sung om in,
Na lam hong taang sak ding hi,
Sanggam aw nitaang sungah om dih in.
